In-Custody Referral Release Report from Pretrial Diversion
Pretrial Diversion In-Custody Referral (ICR) for Assertive Case Management
Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 10/04/22 FTA COMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT ASSESSMENT
Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 101921 FTA HEARING, 3RD BW

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DAWT/BWDNC/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANTPRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:CJC PROGRESS REPORT/DOPC/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/LDTR:09-21-20/GTW/X:LAST DAY & TRIAL DATES VACATED/CTORD: THIS CASE IS REFERRED TO CJC FOR ASSESSMENT/TRANS POLK: FOR CJC ASSESSMENT ON 09-08-20 AT 1:30 P,M,/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:ERIC DYER, SFPD/WIT SWORN:JASON TRUMPP,SFPD/EXHMA:PEO 1 THRU 4) PHOTOS/EXHMA:DEF A) VIDEO/HTA1:1/X:MISDEMEANORCOUNT 2 IS CERTIFIED/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT, 22/DOP/SA1:JOSE ORTIZ VILLANUEVA/SA2:1690 FOLSOM ST,, SF/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:06-25-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXTBUSINESS DAY/CTORD:NO ALCOHOL OR DRUGS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
